channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NSF Discovering Our Universe gallery opens July 1 at Smithsonian
item.description: The new 'U.S. National Science Foundation Discovering Our Universe' gallery opens to the public July 1 at the Smithsonian's National Air and Space Museum.

item.title: Scientists recreate dinosaur nest, solving 70-million-year-old mystery
item.description: Researchers recreated a life-size oviraptor nest to investigate how bird-like dinosaurs incubated their eggs millions of years ago.

item.title: Surprising brain discovery challenges long-held views on movement disorders
item.description: A new finding overturns a key assumption about the brain's movement center, revealing unexpected roles for two cerebellar cells.

item.title: Simple water trick cuts diesel engine pollution by over 60%
item.description: A straightforward fuel modification could significantly reduce diesel engine emissions, according to a review of global studies.
